src/core/actions.ts.summary: actions() logic builder: turns action definitions into action creators, sync/async dispatchers, and type maps on the logic. Async dispatch awaits pending listener promises keyed by dispatchId, re-looping on breakpoint errors.
src/core/actions.ts.inputs: ActionDefinitions object or (logic)=>defs; also createActionCreator(type, payloadCreator), createActionType(key, pathString).
src/core/actions.ts.outputs: LogicBuilder; populates logic.actionCreators/actions/asyncActions/actionKeys/actionTypes. Helpers return a KeaAction / formatted type string.
src/core/actions.ts.should: Build action creators, dispatch through context store, honor disableAsyncActions, resolve async via listeners pendingDispatches.
src/core/actions.ts.shouldNot: Own reducer/selector/listener registration, React, or store creation.
src/core/actions.ts.side: Dispatches to global context store; mutates logic; increments module async counter.

src/core/connect.ts.summary: connect() logic builder: pulls other logics' actions and value-selectors into this logic, adds their connections, handles 'a as b' mapping, circular builds, and function selectors. addConnection copies connection maps.
src/core/connect.ts.inputs: ConnectDefinitions or (props)=>defs; helper deconstructMapping(array), addConnection(logic, otherLogic).
src/core/connect.ts.should: Wire cross-logic actions/values, build wrapper logics, define lazy value getters, error on bad mappings.
src/core/connect.ts.shouldNot: Define its own reducers, mount logic, or touch React.
src/core/connect.ts.side: Reads global context/store, may build other logics, mutates logic and its props-derived defs.

src/core/defaults.ts.summary: defaults() logic builder: sets reducer default values on the logic, either a root '*' function or per-key, preferring persisted context reducerDefaults. getContextDefaults walks the path in the context defaults tree.
src/core/defaults.ts.outputs: LogicBuilder; sets logic.defaults. Helper returns a defaults record or void.
src/core/defaults.ts.should: Populate logic.defaults, respect flatDefaults and automatic-path skipping, prefer context defaults.

src/core/events.ts.summary: events() logic builder plus afterMount/beforeUnmount/propsChanged sugar: registers lifecycle handlers on logic.events, chaining arrays and existing handlers so multiple registrations all run.
src/core/events.ts.inputs: EventDefinitions or (logic)=>defs; sugar builders take (logic)=>void or (logic,oldProps)=>void.
src/core/events.ts.outputs: LogicBuilder; mutates logic.events with composed handlers.
src/core/events.ts.should: Merge/compose lifecycle callbacks, flatten arrays of handlers.
src/core/events.ts.shouldNot: Invoke the events, mount, or touch store/React.

src/core/index.ts.summary: Core barrel + corePlugin definition: re-exports all core builders and declares the plugin providing default logic fields, the listeners plugin-context setup, listeners redux middleware, and legacy kea 2.0 object build ordering.
src/core/index.ts.inputs: None direct; corePlugin consumed by context activation. Middleware receives store/next/action.
src/core/index.ts.outputs: Re-exports; corePlugin: KeaPlugin with defaults() and events hooks.
src/core/index.ts.should: Seed blank logic fields, install listeners middleware, run legacy builders in fixed order.
src/core/index.ts.shouldNot: Implement builder internals itself (delegates to sibling modules).
src/core/index.ts.side: Middleware dispatches listeners on actions; setPluginContext writes plugin context.

src/core/key.ts.summary: key() logic builder: computes a key from props and appends it to the logic path, guarding against duplicate key builders, undefined keys, and adding a key after actions already exist.
src/core/key.ts.outputs: LogicBuilder; sets logic.key/keyBuilder and extends logic.path/pathString.
src/core/key.ts.should: Derive and attach key, preserve automatic-path marker, throw on misuse.

src/core/listeners.ts.summary: listeners()/sharedListeners() builders and the listeners plugin machinery: wraps listener fns with breakpoint tracking, registers/unregisters them by action/path in plugin context on mount/unmount, and tracks pending promises per dispatchId.
src/core/listeners.ts.inputs: listeners input (object/fn), sharedListeners input; internal add/remove listeners and dispatch tracking helpers; isBreakpoint(error).
src/core/listeners.ts.outputs: LogicBuilders; ListenersPluginContext type; boolean/void helpers. Mutates logic.listeners/cache and plugin context byAction/byPath/pendingPromises/pendingDispatches.
src/core/listeners.ts.should: Wrap listeners with breakpoint semantics, dedupe by contextId, track async promises for asyncActions, cleanup on unmount.
src/core/listeners.ts.shouldNot: Dispatch actions itself or manage reducers/React.
src/core/listeners.ts.side: Registers afterMount/beforeUnmount events; reads/writes global plugin context and logic.cache; setTimeout via breakpoints.

src/core/path.ts.summary: path() logic builder: sets the logic's explicit path (array or key=>array function), replacing an automatic path but ignoring repeat calls, and forbidding path changes after actions exist.
src/core/path.ts.should: Assign explicit path, append existing key, filter undefined key from kea2 path fns, throw after actions.

src/core/props.ts.summary: props() logic builder: merges input props under any already-set props on the logic, updating lastProps and props via Object.assign only when a shallow comparison shows a change.
src/core/props.ts.should: Seed default props without overwriting existing, skip work when unchanged.

src/core/reducers.ts.summary: reducers() builder plus rootReducer/rootSelector: for each key sets defaults, builds an action-type->reducer mapping (merged across calls via cache), creates the redux-style reducer and a memoized reselect selector+value. pathSelector reads state at the logic path.
src/core/reducers.ts.should: Assemble per-key reducers, resolve defaults (context/root/initial), memoize selectors, error on selector name clash or undefined action.
src/core/reducers.ts.shouldNot: Attach reducers to the store or run listeners.
src/core/reducers.ts.side: Reads global store state/context; mutates logic; uses reselect/combineKeaReducers.

src/core/selectors.ts.summary: selectors() builder: creates memoized reselect selectors from input selector tuples, exposes props as callable prop-selectors (via Proxy with helpful errors), and defines lazy value getters. addSelectorAndValue registers a selector plus its value getter.
src/core/selectors.ts.outputs: LogicBuilder; sets logic.selectors and logic.values getters.
src/core/selectors.ts.should: Build/validate memoized selectors, guard duplicate names and non-function inputs, wire props access.
src/core/selectors.ts.side: Reads global store state; mutates logic.selectors/values; defines property getters.

src/index.ts.summary: Public package entrypoint: re-exports types, utils, core builders, kea(), React hooks/components, context and store APIs, plugin activation, and named reducer action constants; creates a default context on import.
src/index.ts.should: Aggregate the public surface, initialize a default kea context.
src/index.ts.shouldNot: Contain business logic of its own.
src/index.ts.side: Calls resetContext at import time (creates global context).

src/kea/build.ts.summary: Logic build engine: getBuiltLogic caches/creates a BuiltLogic per wrapper+key, runs plugin defaults and all inputs/builders, manages the build heap for circular detection, updates props and fires propsChanged. applyInputToLogic dispatches builder-fn vs legacy-object inputs.
src/kea/build.ts.inputs: wrapper + props; internal applyInputToLogic; cache lookups by key/props; getWrapperContext.
src/kea/build.ts.outputs: BuiltLogic; caches in wrapperContext.builtLogics; wrapper context bookkeeping.
src/kea/build.ts.should: Build logic once, connect dependencies, run plugin lifecycle (beforeBuild/afterBuild etc), detect circular builds.
src/kea/build.ts.shouldNot: Mount logic, attach reducers, or render React.
src/kea/build.ts.side: Reads/mutates global context (inputCounter, buildHeap, wrapperContexts); runs plugins; batchChanges for propsChanged.

src/kea/context.ts.summary: Kea context lifecycle: holds the single module-level context; open/close/reset build the context object (plugins, mount maps, reducer tree, options, lazy store getter), activate corePlugin, and expose plugin-context get/set and store-state access.
src/kea/context.ts.inputs: ContextOptions; plugin context name for get/set.
src/kea/context.ts.should: Create/replace the global context, defer store creation, seed default options, activate core plus user plugins.
src/kea/context.ts.side: Mutates module-level context singleton; creates store; runs plugins.

src/kea/kea.ts.summary: kea() factory: creates the callable LogicWrapper with build/wrap/mount/unmount/find/findMounted/extend methods and proxied fields, dispatching call to build (props/undefined) or wrap (component). Also proxyFields/proxyFieldToLogic expose built-logic fields on the wrapper.
src/kea/kea.ts.inputs: LogicInput or array of inputs/builders; proxy helpers take wrapper+key.
src/kea/kea.ts.should: Assemble wrapper API, lazily proxy fields to a mounted/built logic, error clearly when unmounted.
src/kea/kea.ts.shouldNot: Implement build/mount internals (delegates to build.ts/mount.ts) or React wrapping (delegates to wrap.ts).
src/kea/kea.ts.side: Reads global context; defines property getters that may build logic.

src/kea/mount.ts.summary: mountLogic/unmountLogic: reference-count mount all of a logic's connections (deps first, self last; reverse on unmount), running beforeMount/afterMount (and unmount) plugin+event hooks and attaching/detaching reducers when count hits threshold, clearing build cache on full unmount.
src/kea/mount.ts.outputs: void; mutates context mount counter/mounted maps.
src/kea/mount.ts.should: Order (un)mounting by connections, run lifecycle hooks, attach/detach reducers, dedupe via counts.
src/kea/mount.ts.shouldNot: Build logic or manage React rendering directly.
src/kea/mount.ts.side: Mutates global mount state; attaches/detaches redux reducers; runs plugins/events; deletes cached built logic.

src/kea/plugins.ts.summary: Plugin system: activatePlugin registers a plugin (validating unique name, recording logic fields, warning on reserved/duplicate fields, wiring event arrays and running afterPlugin). runPlugins invokes all handlers for a given lifecycle event key.
src/kea/plugins.ts.should: Register plugins and dispatch lifecycle events in order, guard reserved field names.
src/kea/plugins.ts.shouldNot: Know about specific builders or React.
src/kea/plugins.ts.side: Mutates global context.plugins; console warnings; optional debug logging.

src/kea/reducer.ts.summary: Redux reducer tree management: builds/regenerates the nested root reducer tree, attaches/detaches a logic's reducer at its path (with attach/detach strategies), combineKeaReducers (custom combine that drops stale keys), keaReducer factory, and the top-level redux store reducer.
src/kea/reducer.ts.inputs: BuiltLogic for attach/detach; pathStart strings; reducer maps.
src/kea/reducer.ts.outputs: ReducerFunctions; ATTACH/DETACH constants; mutates context.reducers tree/roots/combined.
src/kea/reducer.ts.should: Maintain the reducer tree, regenerate combined reducer, dispatch/replace on attach/detach per strategy, avoid redux stale-key warnings.
src/kea/reducer.ts.side: Mutates global context.reducers; dispatches to / replaces store reducer; runs plugins.

src/kea/store.ts.summary: createStore: builds the redux store from cloned options, installs listeners middleware/enhancers, a pause-listeners enhancer, redux-devtools compose, and path whitelisting; guards against missing context or an already-created store, runs before/afterReduxStore plugins.
src/kea/store.ts.outputs: redux Store (or void on error); pauseListenersEnhancer.
src/kea/store.ts.should: Assemble and create the single redux store, apply middleware/enhancers, set up whitelisted reducer roots, pause subscriptions when paused.
src/kea/store.ts.shouldNot: Define reducers/logic; be created twice per context.
src/kea/store.ts.side: Reads/mutates global context (store, reducers.redux/whitelist); runs plugins; reads window devtools.

src/react/hooks.ts.summary: React hooks: useSelector/useValues/useAllValues/useActions/useAsyncActions and useMountedLogic (mounts a logic for a component's lifetime, remounting on path change and handling Fast Refresh). batchChanges pauses redux subscriptions during a callback and flushes later.
src/react/hooks.ts.outputs: values/actions objects, subscribed state; pauseCounter/isPaused; batchChanges.
src/react/hooks.ts.should: Bridge kea logic to React via useSyncExternalStore, mount/unmount logic with refs/effects, batch/pause store notifications.
src/react/hooks.ts.shouldNot: Build reducers/store or define logic builders.
src/react/hooks.ts.side: Mounts/unmounts logic; reads global store; module-level pauseCounter and flush timeout dispatch.

src/react/wrap.ts.summary: wrapComponent: HOC that builds the logic for props, injects all values, actions and dispatch into the wrapped component, runs wrap/render plugin hooks, and injects a this.actions getter for class components.
src/react/wrap.ts.should: Merge logic values/actions into props, support class-component this.actions, run before/afterWrap and beforeRender hooks.
src/react/wrap.ts.shouldNot: Manage mounting counters or reducers directly (uses hooks).
src/react/wrap.ts.side: Reads global context (dispatch); mutates class prototype; runs plugins.

src/react/bind.tsx.summary: BindLogic React component and context helper: gets/creates a React context per logic wrapper, builds the logic with given props, mounts it, and provides the built logic to descendants so hooks resolve to this instance.
src/react/bind.tsx.outputs: JSX provider element; getOrCreateContextForLogicWrapper returns a React context.
src/react/bind.tsx.should: Scope a keyed/prop-specific logic instance to a subtree via React context, keep it mounted.

src/react/provider.tsx.summary: Provider: legacy no-op React component that renders children and warns once (except in test env) that it should be removed in favor of react-redux Provider or Kea's useSelector.
src/react/provider.tsx.should: Render children unchanged; emit a one-time deprecation warning.
src/react/provider.tsx.shouldNot: Provide any store/context or perform real work.

src/utils.ts.summary: Small shared utilities: isLogicWrapper and isBuiltLogic type guards (checking marker fields) and shallowCompare for one-level object equality by keys and strict-equal values.
src/utils.ts.should: Detect wrapper vs built logic, compare objects shallowly.
src/utils.ts.shouldNot: Depend on context, store, or React.

src/types.ts.summary: Central TypeScript type declarations for the whole library: Logic/BuiltLogic/LogicWrapper, builder input definition types (actions/reducers/selectors/listeners/events/connect), plugin/context/store option types, and typegen helper types like MakeLogicType/KeaLogicType.
src/types.ts.should: Define the shared type contracts and public type helpers.
